# TraderLoading

> TraderLoading is a free all-in-one web workspace for retail traders that combines an
> auto-synced trading journal, real-time macro news intelligence, risk management tools
> and gamified discipline routines. Interface available in English, Italian, Spanish,
> French and German.

## What it does

- **Trading journal with automatic sync**: connects to a live trading account through
  FX Blue Account Sync (MT4/MT5, read-only — never the master password). Every closed
  trade is imported with entry/exit, stop loss, take profit, P&L, commissions and swap,
  and rendered with an R-multiple, trade duration and a candlestick chart snapshot of
  the trade window.
- **Account equity tracking**: balance curve anchored to the real broker account balance,
  with period P&L, max drawdown and a monthly P&L calendar heatmap.
- **Macro news intelligence**: curated real-time news feed for FX, gold and crypto with
  per-asset impact scores, deep-dive explanations (what happened, why it matters,
  possible impact) and a market sentiment gauge.
- **Risk and preparation tools**: position size calculator, pre-trade checklist,
  economic calendar, COT report, average daily range and volatility stats, market
  session clock.
- **Backtesting**: chart replay on real historical candles (FX Replay style) with
  per-session statistics.
- **Discipline and psychology**: guided morning and evening routines, session emotional
  check-ins, mood-vs-performance win rate insights, breathing and meditation exercises,
  daily missions with XP, levels and unlockable content.
- **Community**: social feed, direct messages with end-to-end encryption, leaderboards
  and friend challenges.

## Key facts

- Pricing: free to start (no credit card required).
- Platform: web application (desktop and mobile responsive, installable PWA).
- Broker connection: FX Blue Account Sync only, read-only by design; the platform can
  never place orders or access the account master password.
- Sign-up: https://traderloading.com/sign-up
- Support contact: assistenza@traderloading.com

## Pages

- [Home / overview](https://traderloading.com/): product landing page
- [Sign up](https://traderloading.com/sign-up): create a free account
- [Sign in](https://traderloading.com/sign-in): existing users
- [Privacy policy](https://traderloading.com/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://traderloading.com/terms)
